description: Create an interactive form dashboard named 'Web_Error_Investigator' in Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!) to help L1 support investigate web errors. The dashboard must include a Text Input with token 'ip_filter' (default '*'), a Dropdown Input with token 'level_filter' (default '*', including choices for '*' and 'error'), and a Time Picker. The dashboard must contain a panel that queries 'index=web_logs' and dynamically incorporates both the '$ip_filter$' and '$level_filter$' tokens.
